prompt: Create a solution spec: Diversity-focused Engineering TalentAI. Target user: Engineering manager at a public media organization with 5-10 open positions. Solution: Diversity-focused engineering talent database and applicant tracking system that integrates with company career pages and popular job boards. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Ai-powered Engineering TalentAI. Target user: Engineering manager at a public media organization with 5-10 open positions and a budget of $50-$100 per hire for sourcing and recruiting. Solution: AI-powered engineering talent sourcing and hiring platform that connects companies with a curated pool of engineering candidates from underrepresented groups and tech alumni networks. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Purpose-driven Engineering TalentAI. Target user: Engineering manager at a public media organization with 5-10 open positions and a focus on retaining top talent. Solution: Purpose-driven engineering talent retention platform that uses AI to match employees with meaningful projects and provides a suite of employee engagement and well-being tools. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Provides An Ai-poweredAI. Target user: Freelance recruiters and talent analysts. Solution: Provides an AI-powered talent sourcing platform to unify candidate research and applicant tracking across multiple job boards and hiring tools. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Streamlines The HiringAI. Target user: Remote Team Lead responsible for hiring SDRs at a tech startup or digital agency.. Solution: Streamlines the hiring process for remote SDRs by providing a curated pool of pre-screened candidates.. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: Create A ProfessionalAI. Target user: Freelance legal counsel with 1-5 years of experience. Solution: Create a professional network for freelance legal counsel to showcase their expertise, credentials, and past projects to attract more clients.. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
